orientation.$description: Approved orientation values in degrees; consumers apply the angle unit at use time.

ratio.$description: Provisional construction ratio, not a canonical silhouette bounding-box aspect ratio.

tangent-continuity.$description: Owner-approved Continuous Lens constraint: the closed silhouette is tangent-continuous and contains no corners, straight segments, notches, chamfers, wedges, or key cuts. This qualitative invariant is canonical; numerical geometry remains provisional.

offset.$description: Provisional construction offset retained for calibration experiments; it is not approved final geometry.

reveal-depth.$description: Provisional screen-space reveal depth; physical production depth requires separate evidence.
